entity.label: Tabrimon
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Good is Rimmon, the father of Benhadad, king of Syria (1 Kings 15:18).

nodes.label: Tabrimon
nodes.description: Good is Rimmon, the father of Benhadad, king of Syria (1 Kings 15:18).

nodes.label: Hezion
nodes.description: Vision, the father of Tabrimon, and grandfather of Ben-hadad, king of Syria (1 Kings 15:18).

nodes.label: Ben-hadad
nodes.description: The king of Syria whom Asa, king of Judah, employed to invade Israel (1 Kings 15:18).

verses.text: Then Asa took all the silver and the gold that were left in the treasures of the house of the LORD, and the treasures of the king’s house, and delivered them into the hand of his servants: and king Asa sent them to Benhadad, the son of Tabrimon, the son of Hezion, king of Syria, that dwelt at Damascus, saying,
